response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the role specifically requires a C++ developer with 8-12 years of hands-on C++ experience, industrial automation domain knowledge, and IEC 62443/SDL security expertise. C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments (2014-2015) and an academic bachelor thesis. No evidence of message brokers, MQTT, industrial protocols, or secure development lifecycle work aligned with IEC 62443.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with multi-threaded, low-latency systems (Dunnhumby)
Strong testing/TDD culture, mentoring, workshops, and architectural mindset
Some networked/event-driven and IoT-adjacent exposure via GISCollective and microservices work
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — only ~6 months at National Instruments a decade ago
No demonstrated experience with MQTT, message brokers, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850)
No evidence of IEC 62443 / SDL or industrial cybersecurity background

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and architecture breadth
